summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 5 CaseFlow features: Backend Refactoring (14 route modules), Advanced Reporting (PDF/CSV), Notification System, Team Messaging, Enhanced Dashboard, and Payments Redesign. All 36 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including dashboard activity widgets, reports page, messages page, payments with filter tabs, notification bell, and client wizard regression.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: Admin login with access_token
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected (401)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns client_count, service_count, visit_count, outcome_count, pending_count, unread_notifications
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/trends - returns trend data points
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/outcomes - returns outcome status groups
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/activity - NEW endpoint returns recent_clients, upcoming_visits, pending_approvals, overdue_payments
Backend: GET /api/reports/export - CSV clients export
Backend: GET /api/reports/export/services - CSV services export
Backend: GET /api/reports/export/visits - CSV visits export
Backend: GET /api/reports/export/outcomes - CSV outcomes export
Backend: GET /api/reports/export/payments - CSV payments export
Backend: Invalid report type returns 400
Backend: GET /api/reports/org/pdf - Organization PDF report (valid PDF)
Backend: GET /api/reports/client/{id}/pdf - Client PDF report (valid PDF)
Backend: Invalid client ID returns 404
Backend: GET /api/notifications - List notifications
Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count - Returns count
Backend: POST /api/notifications/read-all - Mark all read
Backend: PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read - Mark single read
Backend: GET /api/messages - List messages
Backend: GET /api/messages/unread-count - Returns count
Backend: POST /api/messages - Send message
Backend: GET /api/messages/{id} - Get message detail
Backend: POST /api/messages/{id}/reply - Reply to message
Backend: Invalid recipient returns 404
Backend: POST /api/payments/request - Create payment request
Backend: GET /api/payments/requests - List payment requests
Backend: PATCH /api/payments/requests/{id} - Update status
Backend: GET /api/payments/summary - Payment summary
Backend: GET /api/payments/history - Payment history
Backend: GET /api/clients - Returns paginated data with pagination object
Backend: POST /api/clients - Create client (returns 201)
Backend: POST /api/clients/wizard - Create client via wizard (returns 201)
Backend: POST /api/demo/seed - Seed demo data
Backend: POST /api/demo/clear - Clear demo data
Frontend: Dashboard loads with stat cards (CLIENTS, SERVICES, VISITS, OUTCOMES)
Frontend: Dashboard quick actions (Onboard Client, Add Client, Reports, Calendar)
Frontend: Dashboard Activity Trend chart (30 days)
Frontend: Dashboard Outcome Distribution chart
Frontend: Dashboard Upcoming Visits widget with client names
Frontend: Dashboard Recent Clients widget
Frontend: Notification bell in header with unread badge
Frontend: Notification dropdown with mark-read functionality
Frontend: Sidebar with Reports and Messages nav items
Frontend: Reports page with Organization Report PDF download
Frontend: Reports page with Client Report PDF download (with client selector)
Frontend: Reports page with Outcome Tracking chart
Frontend: Reports page with 5 CSV export buttons (Clients, Services, Visits, Outcomes, Payments)
Frontend: Messages page with New Message button
Frontend: Messages compose dialog with recipient selector, subject, message fields
Frontend: Payments page shows payment requests only (no subscriptions)
Frontend: Payments page filter tabs (ALL, PENDING, PAID, OVERDUE, CANCELLED)
Frontend: Payments page summary cards (RECEIVED, PENDING, OVERDUE)
Frontend: Payments page table with status badges and action buttons
Frontend: Client Onboarding Wizard Step 1 (Personal Info)
Frontend: Admin Settings Users tab with role management
Frontend: Admin Settings Demo Mode tab with Load Demo Data and Clear All Data buttons
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded via POST /api/demo/seed - creates 12 clients, services, visits, outcomes, payment requests, and demo user accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features fully tested and working. Backend was successfully refactored from monolithic server.py into 14 route modules (auth, clients, services, visits, outcomes, dashboard, payments, admin, ai, storage, demo, reports, notifications, messages). All existing APIs still work (regression passed). NEW features working: Dashboard activity widgets (recent_clients, upcoming_visits, pending_approvals, overdue_payments), PDF/CSV reporting (org PDF, client PDF, 5 CSV exports), notification system with bell and dropdown, team messaging with compose/reply, payment requests with filter tabs (subscriptions removed). All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing.
